entries.name: fs-readme
entries.description: Reference host plugin — reads the workspace README and returns a preview via a Node JSON-RPC sidecar.

entries.name: pg-browser
entries.description: v1 rewrite of the legacy in-process database panel. A Node sidecar connects to PostgreSQL and exposes list/query commands — installable, permission-gated, and reconfigurable without a reinstall.

configSchema.label: Password
configSchema.description: Stored encrypted via the plugin secret cap (AES-GCM).

configSchema.label: Bootstrap database
configSchema.description: Default database to connect to. list-databases works regardless.
